note: Self-improving loop: improve multicolor pipeline for 20-30 color images; target hw_forest_cat quality.
observations: Clean images: auto-k overshoots by 0-1 (n20→21, n24→24-26, n30→29-30). Loss dominated by coverage gap not palette mismatch.
Noisy images: k badly overshoots to 27-31 regardless of truth count. Palette match drops to 0.35-0.69, coverage to 0.18-0.49. Biggest win available here.
kMatchRate = 0.44 overall; near-perfect on clean, poor on noisy. Elbow detector is noise-sensitive.
Forest cat renders with 30 unique fills and 8273 paths at k=30. Visual review pending.

nextProbe.reason: Highest loss; biggest improvement headroom. Noise-handling is the weakest link.
